case_title: KERRY CLARK VS. JORDAN STEVENS ET AL

docket_entries.description: AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY CLARK, KERRY AS TO DEFENDANT STEVENS, JORDAN STATE FARM MUTUAL AUTOMOBILE INSURANCE COMPANY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-03-2015 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED DEC-01-2014, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT STATE FARM MUTUAL AUTOMOBILE INSURANCE COMPANY

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO PROOF OF SERVICE. PLAINTIFF WAS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (D-506)
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL (AGENT FOR SERVICE OF PROCESS:DANA SILVER) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CLARK, KERRY AS TO DEFENDANT STATE FARM MUTUAL AUTOMOBILE INSURANCE COMPANY

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-03-2015 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO APR-07-2015 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. "PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM AGAINST DEFENDANT, STATE FARM MUTUAL AUTOMOBILE INSURANCE COMPANY, IS DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE--NOT A PROPER PARTY", PER JUDGE MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT EXCEPT DEFENDANT JORDAN STEVENS WHO WAS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT STATE FARM ETC. WAS REPRESENTED BY TAMARA GOULDEN--CLAIMS SPECIALIST FOR DEFENDANT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT STATE FARM MUTUAL AUTOMOBILE INSURANCE COMPANY
CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS TO STATE FARM MUTUAL AUTOMOBILE INSURANCE COMPANY BY COURT AT SMALL CLAIM HEARING OF FEB-03-2015 AT 3:30 PM.

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CLARK, KERRY ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
